menu.title: Royal Wedding Tier Cake
menu.desc: Elegant and meticulously decorated multi-tiered cake designed specifically for your special wedding day.

menu.title: Fruit Cream Fantasy
menu.desc: Custom designer cake covered in vanilla fresh whipped cream and loaded with seasonal glazed tropical fruits.

menu.title: Black Forest Classic
menu.desc: Delicious layers of chocolate sponge base, fresh whipped cream, dark cherries, and chocolate shavings.

menu.title: Butterscotch Bliss
menu.desc: Moist butterscotch sponge layers paired with crunchy butterscotch chips and rich caramel drip.

menu.title: Red Velvet Premium
menu.desc: Royal red cocoa sponge cake filled with velvety smooth cream cheese frosting layers. Irresistible!

menu.title: Strawberry Blush
menu.desc: Sweet and fruity cake baked with fresh strawberries and decorated with pink strawberry buttercream.

menu.title: Caramel Macchiato Slice
menu.desc: Rich coffee-infused sponge cake slice layered with rich caramel sauce and white chocolate cream.

menu.title: Chocolate Truffle Slice
menu.desc: Decadent chocolate sponge cake slice smothered with dense, smooth chocolate ganache glazing.

menu.title: Pineapple Bliss Slice
menu.desc: Light and airy sponge cake slice loaded with chopped pineapples, whipped cream, and cherry topping.

menu.title: Sizzling Samosa Plate
menu.desc: Two pieces of crispy golden-brown triangles stuffed with spiced potatoes and peas, served with sweet & sour chutneys.

menu.title: Choco Lava Fondant
menu.desc: Warm individual chocolate cake with a delicious molten liquid chocolate core. An absolute favorite snack!

menu.title: Steaming Chicken Momo
menu.desc: Freshly prepared steamed dumplings filled with finely chopped spiced chicken, served with tomato sesame chutney.

menu.title: Sizzling Chicken Chowmein
menu.desc: Stir-fried Nepalese noodles with colorful vegetables, chicken chunks, and local herbs and soy sauce.
